summary: Following the completion of a quest, a stream experiences a visual glitch that transitions into a cinematic flashback depicting a battle involving a character named Hyuncheonmazone. The narrative shifts back to the protagonist, Cheongpung, who recovers a significant weapon and interacts with his brother regarding hidden lineages and historical sects. The chapter concludes with the revelation that the quest's resolution is more complex than initially anticipated.
key_moments: A live stream experiences a blackout that reveals a cinematic sequence of Hyuncheonmazone in battle.
Hyuncheonmazone faces off against members of the Gucheonmilbu sect and interacts with fighters from Hwamsan.
Cheongpung recovers a legendary weapon and discusses secret lineages with his brother, hinting at deeper hidden world conflicts.
